canonical_definition: A fine-grained evaluation benchmark for LLM-as-a-judge with 1K test responses, designed to assess scoring accuracy under non-overlapping rubrics from training data.
papers: ConInstruction: Universal Jailbreaking of Multimodal Large Language Models via Non-Textual Modalities
